Applies Dirichlet boundary conditions to RHS and LHS. 


\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item For LHS matrix {\ttfamily 𝐀}, the diagonal term for the Dirichlet DOF is set to {\ttfamily 𝑃}.
\item For RHS vector {\ttfamily 𝐛}, the Dirichlet DOF term is scaled by {\ttfamily 𝑃}. 
\end{DoxyItemize}\mbox{\Hypertarget{classArcane_1_1FemUtils_1_1Gpu_1_1BoundaryConditions_a6458f487f02367f604a854c1d9129ffd}\label{classArcane_1_1FemUtils_1_1Gpu_1_1BoundaryConditions_a6458f487f02367f604a854c1d9129ffd}}
